evals.prompt: How do I add an order bump to increase my average order value?
evals.expected_output: Order bump strategy with pricing guidance, copy advice, and implementation across platforms.

assertions.name: pricing_guidance
assertions.description: Must recommend pricing the order bump at 30-50% of the main offer price

assertions.name: take_rate_benchmark
assertions.description: Must include a benchmark take rate (20-40% for well-positioned order bumps)

assertions.name: copy_advice
assertions.description: Must provide actionable copy advice for the bump checkbox including benefit-driven language

evals.prompt: My checkout page converts at 35% — is that good and how do I improve it?
evals.expected_output: Conversion rate benchmarking and specific improvement recommendations for checkout optimization.

assertions.name: benchmark_context
assertions.description: Must benchmark 35% against industry standards and identify it as within normal range for warm traffic

assertions.name: specific_improvements
assertions.description: Must recommend specific improvements like reducing form fields, adding trust badges, or abandoned cart recovery

assertions.name: ab_testing
assertions.description: Must suggest A/B testing specific checkout elements to improve conversion

evals.prompt: Set up a checkout with upsell and payment plan in Groove
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step GrooveSell configuration for product creation, upsell flow, and payment plan setup.

assertions.name: groovesell_steps
assertions.description: Must provide GrooveSell-specific steps including product creation, payment processor, and checkout page

assertions.name: upsell_flow
assertions.description: Must explain how to configure a post-purchase upsell with accept/decline flow

assertions.name: payment_plan
assertions.description: Must cover payment plan setup and mention GrooveSell's zero transaction fees
